sources.title: TARZAN TRIUMPHS 1943 Colorized
sources.description: As World War II rages, a formation of German paratroopers land in the hidden city of Palandria to exploit its wealth and they start taking hostages. Can Tarzan, the king of the jungle, and his animal companions Cheeta and Buli save them?

metadata.Plot: Zandra, white princess of a lost civilization, comes to Tarzan for help when Nazis invade the jungle with plans to conquer her people and take their wealth. Tarzan, the isolationist, becomes involved after the Nazis shoot at him and capture Boy: "Now Tarzan make war!"
metadata.Writer: Roy Chanslor, Carroll Young, Edgar Rice Burroughs
metadata.Actors: Johnny Weissmuller, Frances Gifford, Johnny Sheffield
